ground_truth.title: Professional Certificate Programs
ground_truth.main_content: Florida Gulf Coast University offers professional certificate programs to help advance careers and earn certifications for national exams. The university has partnered with nationally recognized online learning providers including Ed2Go, CareerStep, W.I.T.S., Center for Legal Studies, and OnCourse Learning. Programs are available in healthcare, business, fitness, management, media and design, skilled trades, information technology, hospitality, and gaming. Courses offer open access learning from anywhere with internet access, with certificates available 24/7. Financial support is available for military spouses through MYCAA benefits. Certificate programs range from 12 to 580 hours and are designed to help students achieve professional caliber positions. Ed2Go offers instructor-guided career training certificate programs as well as six-week professional development courses starting at $99. Career Step provides healthcare training with an integrated technology platform. The Center for Legal Studies offers legal education courses in multiple formats including online, DVD, and text-only. OnCourse Learning provides Florida Real Estate, Broker, Appraisal, and Home Inspection licenses with pre-license, post-license, and continuing education courses.
with: Are you looking to become certified to advance you in your career or earn a certification to prepare for a national exam?
We have partnered with nationally recognized online learning providers to support your educational needs.
Utilize military spouse benefits to get in-demand career training.
Florida Gulf Coast University has partnered with Career Step to help people like you train for a rewarding new career.

Courses are offered in the following content areas: Business and Professional, Healthcare and Fitness, Hospitality, Gaming, Information Technology and Software Development, Management and Corporate, Media and Design, and Skilled Trades and Industrial.
